title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・さいこーっしょ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan tears through the competition. Her
speed is so ridiculous it's almost like a dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She basks in all the praise coming from the crowd,
then asks for my phone and starts recording.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if starting an interview, she asks me how I feel
about my trainee winning the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, without missing a beat, she turns the
camera on herself and declares with a broad smile
that she has the greatest trainer ever.
